commands.review_summary:
The PR changes WebChat session/run reconciliation so terminal run status is published after deferred chat-history replay, with focused tests for the ordering.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main can publish terminal `chatRunStatus` from a session-derived terminal reconciliation before the deferred `loadChatHistory` replay completes; I confirmed the source path but did not run an independent live browser reproduction.
